answer: The original sequence is 5’ – GGATCCTCATG – 3’. A deletion removes at least one base, and a point mutation changes a single base. Option C (5’ – GGATCCATG – 3’) shows a deletion of “TC” (two bases) and a point mutation changing the remaining “T” to “A” is not present, but comparing all options, only C has both a clear deletion (loss of “TC”) and a base change (the “C” after “GGATCC” is missing and the sequence shortens). Thus, the correct answer is \boxed{C}.
